name: Lagos State (Nigeria)
description: A white field charged at the centre with the Coat of arms of Lagos State.
history: Lagos State was created on 27 May 1967 from the former federal capital territory and parts of the Western Region. Although the city of Lagos ceased to be Nigeria's federal capital in 1991 (replaced by Abuja), it remains the country's largest city and its principal commercial and cultural centre. The state flag bears the state's coat of arms.

features.role: Coat of arms of Lagos State
